note: Golden fixtures for the C-block contract. Python (kbft.bounded.render_context) and the npm library MUST both reproduce `expected` byte-for-byte. Regenerate + bump version on change.

input.persona: You are the shopping assistant for TestMart, a general store.

cases.expected: You are the shopping assistant for TestMart, a general store.

cases.name: bespoke

input.persona: You are the shopping assistant for TestMart, a general store.

knowledge.title: Returns
knowledge.text: Perishables are final sale; non-perishables returnable within 14 days.

cases.expected:
You are the shopping assistant for TestMart, a general store.

CURRENT VIEW (items shown to the customer):
1. Aged Cheddar, Sharp [500g] [sku-cheddar] - $8.99
2. Double-Cream Brie [sku-brie] - $6.50

CART: Aged Cheddar, Sharp [500g] [sku-cheddar] x2; Double-Cream Brie [sku-brie] x1

KNOWLEDGE:
- Returns: Perishables are final sale; non-perishables returnable within 14 days.
- Delivery: Same-day delivery on orders over $35.
